feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Code
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Code Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Sap Build Andriod app displays black screen after logging in
entry.content:
Hello Sap Builders,

I am trying to build a sample android app using my trail account to fetch products from Northwind. I configured all the required configurations following this link. I am able to view the data while previewing the data in Lunch application. However, when I build the apk package and installed it on android mobile, I got a build login screen and when I entered username and password, the screens go on loading forever without any log messages and after sometime, the app crashes saying that is "not responding". I tried building the app several times and every time getting stuck at the same screen. Can you help me if I am missing anything here?

In brief, below activities are performed.

1. Ran booster to create build apps, custom identity provider and other required subscriptions
2. Created destination for Northwind in btp cockpit
3. Enabled the btp destination in build app and used the odata in UI canvas.
4. Preview app is successful
5. Create java keystore file in business application studio and used in build.
6. Enabled mobile services for the app and build the android app.
7. Installed the apk file and authenticated using build custom idp credentials/
8. After authentication, the screen goes black and eventually, "app not responding" with options either to wait or close the app.

 

SAP Build SAP Build Code

entry.title: Business Application Studio (BAS) Is Not Opening Instead It Is Redirecting SAP Build Code
entry.content:
Business Application Studio (BAS) is Not Opening, Instead It Is Opening SAP Build Code When It Is Clicked From BTP Cocopit. (Occuring Since 7 May 2024)

Hi,

I Am Facing A Problem To Open Business Application Studio (BAS) From The Cockpit. Whenever I Try To Click On The Link from Cockpit, It Always Redirect To SAP Build Code. Different Web Browsers (Chrome & Opera)Were Also Used With Incognito Mode But No Luck.

In The BAS I Am Using trial Account And There Are Already Deployed Project Exist.

#BAS #SAP Business Application Studio   #SAP Build Code

entry.title: Error while creating sap build code full stack application
entry.content:
Hi,

Learning through the below mentioned learning about sap build code full stack application.

 SAP Build Code Test Drive

But facing this error "Insufficient privileges to perform this action.

Correlation Id: 32ffbdfc-ffe0-4922-4c13-e0c0059ffd5c" Can someone suggest any solution for this. Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Error while creating sap build code full stack applic...
entry.content:
Make sure you have the necessary roles assigned. Specifically, check if you have the “Build Code Administrator” and “Build Code Developer” roles.

  • To assign these roles:
  • Log in to SAP Build Code.
  • Navigate to the user management section.
  • Select “Build Code Administrator” and “Build Code Developer,” then click “Assign Role Collection.” This action will assign the roles to your user.

Hopefully, this will resolve the issue. If you encounter any further problems, feel free to ask.😊

entry.title: Missing files in full-stack app generated by Build Code
entry.content: Hello, I'm surprised that when generating a Full-Stack application with SAP Build Code, it does not generate files like mta.yaml , xs-security.json and xs-app.json . Are all those files supposed to be created manually or via cds commands ?

entry.title: Can't Build Apps and Build Code be activated on the same subaccount?
entry.content:
Hi builders,

I tried to enable Build code to subaccount which had Build apps already.
But It couldn't be enabled like I couldn't make a new project in Build code.

So I tried to make 2 subaccounts, one was with only Build apps and the other one was with only Build code. But each subaccount couldn't work. I could see warning sign when I tried to make service through Booster.

Did anyone suffer from this problem? Or Can anyone from the product team answer this issue?

entry.title: Develop side by side extensions using sap build code in version 2 for any events.
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can we develop side by side extensions using sap build code in c4c version 2 for any events.

Also is it same as we develop using sap btp capm or any restrictions are their.

entry.title: sap build code example for c4c version 2
entry.content:
Hi,

Does anyone can help me with an example for using sap build code in c4c version 2 like based on some events or some background job, not for build apps .

entry.title: CDS Watch fails with folder watch error after a while in SAP Build Code (BAS)
entry.content:
Hey team,

When using SAP Build Code in my trial, I am working on a Full Stack Application (CAPire App). Using the generated Run configuration, everything runs fine, but after a while (few seconds to few minutes) an error occurs which kills the run stack. I feel ther is a bug as the '.git' folder should never be watched.

Help is appriciated.

[cds] - my watch has ended.  
watch.js:121
Process exited with code 1

Uncaught Error Error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, stat '/home/user/projects/supernewaiapp/.git/objects/maintenance.lock'
    at statSync (node:fs:1659:25)
    at <anonymous> (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:160:28)
    at emit (node:events:518:28)
    at FSWatcher._handle.onchange (node:internal/fs/watchers:215:12)
    at callbackTrampoline (node:internal/async_hooks:130:17)
    --- FSEVENTWRAP ---
    at init (node:internal/inspector_async_hook:25:19)
    at emitInitNative (node:internal/async_hooks:202:43)
    at FSWatcher (node:internal/fs/watchers:193:18)
    at watch (node:fs:2463:15)
    at #watchFile (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:156:21)
    at #watchFolder (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:129:26)
    at <anonymous> (node:internal/fs/recursive_watch:179:26)
    at emit (node:events:518:28)
    at FSWatcher._handle.onchange (node:internal/fs/watchers:215:12)
    at callbackTrampoline (node:internal/async_hooks:130:17)

entry.title: ODataModel not getting called when adding authorization header
entry.content:
Hello,
--------
Update 2024-06-25
It seems it's working as expected using the "SAP Business Application Studio Toolkit" - extension in VS Code, but not using Business Application Studio directly". Seems like there's a new bug/feature in Business Application Studio.

Maybe @MarcHuber or some other topic expert has some input.
---------

I have a weird problem that suddently appeared. We have an fiori application where we call a OData secured by a JWT Bearer token. We added the token when creating the odata model.

 

 

 

 

                    const oDataModel = new ODataModel({
                        "serviceUrl": "/odata/v2",
                        "headers": {
                            "Authorization": "Bearer " + accessToken.AccessKey
                        }
                    });

 

 

 

 

This has worked for us up until last Monday, when it suddenly stopped working from within Business Application Studio.

In WebDeveloperTools I can see that the response is a 401, that takes much shorter time than expected from the API

I cannot see the call in the Terminal

 

 

 

 

info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$metadata?sap-language=EN
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService2>/$metadata?sap-language=EN
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$batch
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$batch
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$batch

 

 

 

 

 

If I however comment out the Authorization header in my call, or even replace the header name with anything else it behaves as expected. I get a popup asking for Basic Auth, and I can see the call in the terminal.

 

 

 

 

info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$metadata?sap-language=EN
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$metadata?sap-language=EN
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$batch
info backend-proxy-middleware /odata/v2/$metadata         <-------------
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/
info backend-proxy-middleware /sap/opu/odata/sap/<OtherService>/$batch

 

 

 

 

 

I don't understand what is happening, but to me it seems like either Chrome or backend-proxy-middleware suddenly filters out calls with an Authorization header.  It seems like it's working on our version deployed on a Gateway Hub, so I tend to think it's the backend-proxy-middleware that does something.

Regards
Mattias

entry.title: Need full-stack developers who created business app based on CAP and SAP Fiori Elements
entry.content:
Hello, I'm customer experience researcher in SAP BTP org and I'm looking for full-stack developers who already created business applications based on CAP and SAP Fiori Elements. Would like to meet you for a short feedback interview.

No need to prepare anything. Only meet me remotely for 30 min. No matter which IDE you've been using.

If you have the time to meet, please send me an email: ravid.ellenbogen@sap.com 

 

Thank you for your collaboration!

Ravid Ellenbogen

SAP Low-Code/No-Code

entry.title: Destination and Cloud Connector Configured, but Services Not Visible in SAP Build (BAS)
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I am facing an issue with my SAP Build (BAS) environment. I have successfully added a destination and established a Cloud Connector connection to my on-premise S/4HANA system. The connection is successful, as indicated by the green dot in the Cloud Connector.

However, when I log into SAP Build (BAS), the green dot that indicates the active status is not visible for the system, and I cannot see any of the services to use.

Thanks,.

entry.title: How can I implement a feature to mark on images in SAP Appgyver?
entry.content: The "Marker Overlay Container" component in the marketplace isn't working properly. I set an image for the component, but it's not displaying in the preview. Can anyone help with this issue?

entry.title: Joule "not currently enabled for you" when following SAP Build Code Test Drive Mission
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I am working through the SAP Build Code Test Drive mission, and I am coming across an issue with Joule in Business Application Studio. I am using a BTP Trial Account.

When i created my project I attempted to use an existing Dev Space and have Build Code create a new one, but matter what I see the below when attempting to access the Joule tab.

Has anyone encountered this before? If so, what is a fix for it? Thanks!

entry.title: SAP API Hub- Add new environment
entry.content:
I am following the tutorial to create SAP Build Automation, however I am stuck at the point to create new environment in the API Hub as mentioned in below link

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-run-process-api-trigger.html

I entered all the fields namely:  Display Name, Starting URL, Client ID and Secret, Authentication Domain, Consumer subdomain. But still it shows a pop up that a mandatory field is missing.

Can some one please help.

entry.title: How to Select Items on Tcode ME52N with VBA Script
entry.content:
Hi Dears,

kindly help I want to select an item on T-Code ME52N with reference to the range C5 but when in macro it doesn't work. Thank you in advance.

here is the macro:

Private Sub ME52N_Click()
Dim ComboBoxValue As String
ComboBoxValue = ThisWorkbook.Sheets("PROFILE INDICATOR").Range("C5").Value
 
Session.FindById("wnd[0]").maximize
Session.FindById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/okcd").Text = "/NME53N"
Session.FindById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 0
Session.FindById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 17
Session.FindById("wnd[1]/usr/subSUB0:SAPLMEGUI:0003/ctxtMEPO_SELECT-BANFN").Text = Range("C4").Value
Session.FindById("wnd[1]/usr/subSUB0:SAPLMEGUI:0003/ctxtMEPO_SELECT-BANFN").caretPosition = 8
Session.FindById("wnd[1]").sendVKey 0
Session.FindById("wnd[0]").sendVKey 7
Session.FindById("wnd[0]/usr/subSUB0:SAPLMEGUI:0010/subSUB3:SAPLMEVIEWS:1100/subSUB2:SAPLMEVIEWS:1200/subSUB1:SAPLMEGUI:1301/subSUB1:SAPLMEGUI:6000/cmbDYN_6000-LIST").SetFocus
 
'the problem is here:
Session.FindById("wnd[0]/usr/subSUB0:SAPLMEGUI:0010/subSUB3:SAPLMEVIEWS:1100/subSUB2:SAPLMEVIEWS:1200/subSUB1:SAPLMEGUI:1301/subSUB1:SAPLMEGUI:6000/cmbDYN_6000-LIST").Key = ComboBoxValue
 
End Sub

entry.title: Surcharge VBA script not found macro record.
entry.content:
Hi Dears,

I did a macro record in VA03 opened Display but did not find the scripting for "SURCHARGE". Please help the script so that it can copy the surcharge value. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello, experts
I have a question about Build Apps. I understand that the build app is based on Low code/No code
Can't you draw a screen using codes such as ABAP or JAVASCRIPT at all? I wonder if I can draw a screen by directly inserting the code rather than calling it through OData. For example, I drag and use a button with drag and drop, but I wonder if it is possible to draw a button on the screen by squeezing it into code at the same time
Rather than writing free JavaScript code like in a typical coding environment, it can be used in a limited environment. For example, processing a specific variable or adding a simple calculation logic, is that right?

entry.title: CAP: $count=true returning 0 as the amount although the results are not empty
entry.content:
Hello CAP Experts,

I was creating a basic CAP task list application within the SAP Build Code which works out of the box. Now, I wanted to add a service that only returns the user's tasks. While the basic services/entities are returning the correct amount, my custom service is returning the correct entities in the value but the "@odata.count" is 0. 

This is what is being returned for my current user:

  "@odata.context": "$metadata#UserTasks",
  "@odata.count": 0,
  "value": [
    {
      "ID": "a82f72e9-4ef4-4bed-8aae-60995e5effc0",
      "doneDateTime": null,
      "status": "Open",
      "userMail": "xxx@x.com",
      "taskDescription": "Restock shelves"
    },
    {
      "ID": "1fb9b006-11f9-42b7-b6fc-8f6a57076e63",
      "doneDateTime": null,
      "status": "Open",
      "userMail": "xxx@x.com",
      "taskDescription": "Inventory check"
    },
    {
      "ID": "8d84f9d7-6b62-4e55-8ad1-2dc77390afcb",
      "doneDateTime": "2021-07-01T10:00:00Z",
      "status": "Done,
      "userMail": "xxx@x.com",
      "taskDescription": "Staff training"
    }
  ]
}

  As you can see, the "@odata.count" is 0 although there are multiple entries. Here is my service.cds and service.js:

@Path : '/service/taskapp'
service taskappSrv
{
    @odata.draft.enabled
    entity GenericTasks as
        projection on my.GenericTasks;

    entity UserTasks as projection on my.Tasks {
        *,
        genericTask.description as taskDescription
    };

    entity OpenTasks as 
        projection on my.Tasks
        where status = 'Open';

    @CDS.redirection.target : 'Tasks'
    entity Tasks as
        projection on my.Tasks;
}

UserTasks is the service that is being requested. Here is my custom logic:

module.exports = cds.service.impl(async function () {
  const { UserTasks } = this.entities;

  this.on('READ', 'UserTasks', async (req) => {
    const userMail = req.headers["x-username"];

    console.log('Requested userMail', userMail);

    if (!userMail) {
      req.error(400, 'Parameter "userMail" ist erforderlich');
      return;
    }

    const tasks = await SELECT.from(UserTasks)
      .columns('ID', 'doneDateTime', 'status', 'userMail', 'taskDescription')
      .where({ userMail: userMail });

    console.log('Filtered tasks with description:', tasks);

    return tasks;
  });
});

It is returning and logging the tasks correctly, however my only problem is that the "@odata.count" is 0 in the final response and I don't find any way to change it. The URL that is requested:

/service/taskapp/UserTasks?$count=true

Another thread had the same problem but as I was using the newer version, I am already using oData v4. Also, in the documentation I could not find a workaround for this.

Best regards

entry.title: CAP Build Code & Joule project deployment to CF
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to deploy my CAP project (named cap_bc) created using SAP Build code and Joule to SAP BTP subaccount/space. I added mta.yml file using command "cds add mta" and manifest.json file is already there in "webapp" folder. Deployment is also almost successful but at the end I am getting error related to metadata as below -

"Application "cap_bc-srv" started and available at "f*******trial-dev-cap-bc-srv.cfapps.us10-001.hana.ondemand.com"
Skipping deletion of services, because the command line option "--delete-services" is not specified.
Process finished.

Use "cf dmol -i 1f04c7e0-6111-11ef-9e05-eeee0a8230ab" to download the logs of the process.
cf update-user-provided-service cap_bc-metadata -t "DeployedUTCTime: 2024-08-23T05:33:53.331Z"
Updating user provided service cap_bc-metadata in org f0*****trial / space dev as s************1@gmail.com...
Service instance 'cap_bc-metadata' not found
FAILED
Exit error code: 1 "
 
I do not see any user provided service and anything like "cap_bc-metadata" in my mta.yml/ package.json files. I am attaching my mta.yml & package.json files also.
 
Further, is there any other way to deploy Build Code project? I am trying to deploy in regular way mostly manually by adding mta yml files etc. Kindly guide me with the steps.
 
Thanks in advance.
- Saurabh
